author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Committed on feature/756-full-event-emission: all mutations event-sourced, 8 new/extended variants, reducer rules with id adoption + tombstones, single emission choke point with dual-write mirror. Director review added on top of agent passes: claim-rewrite signature invalidation fix (clear + re-sign) and shadow-ref byte-parity rebuild via new hub_v3::commit_log_bytes -- both were silent-divergence bugs the agents missed. Gates: fmt, both clippy profiles, 1966 lib + 2955 bin + 194 integration green. Awaiting push.
